horoscope: You can feel compelled to deal with a nagging problem today, dear Aries, and finally take care of it. There is strong healing energy accessible to you. You're unlikely to accept poor conditions for yourself now, and you are ready to take decisive action. You're also seeking special ways to enjoy or express yourself, and you quite enjoy increased passion for a project or personal interest now. You may be able to turn a chore into a pleasant pursuit, especially as the day advances, when keeping busy and enjoying yourself as you attend to important duties comes naturally.

This can be a day for defending someone or an idea, dear Taurus, and feeling good about doing so. You might choose to build rapport with friends or a group today, or you may take the lead on a matter, going your own creative way while considering others' input as well. In any group situation, you are a leader now. You might connect with someone with technical knowledge for a problem you’ve been experiencing, or come to someone’s aid with your own insight. You can be in a great position to strategize and design plans. Crafting a master plan for a project or endeavor can be satisfying.

Strong energy is available to you today for new creative approaches to a special project or to your work, dear Gemini. It’s a time for actively exploring your options and taking steps towards your larger goals. It may be a better time, generally speaking, to follow the rules and do what others expect of you than to break out on a new path just for now. Still, within these bounds, you can do much. You could also bond with others who share your goals and vision. You're likely to be in a busy but pleasant frame of mind. You can feel pleasantly ambitious and personally confident now, and you're attracting people into your life or enjoying friendships that are particularly reinforcing.

You're thinking about what's best for you in the long term today, dear Cancer, which helps you make good choices. Unravelling a mystery from your past may be in focus. As well, you might thoroughly enjoy working on a master plan or special project now. It can be a time for a subtle but helpful boost to your reputation or professional life. Good energy is with you for creative problem-solving today. You may be excited about helping people understand your point of view, and you can be ready for a healthy debate. Bonding with others about ideas and ideals can figure strongly now.

Business strategy can thrive today, dear Leo. You may be drawing up effective plans and solving problems quickly and expertly. If there has been inequality in a relationship, you are more likely to address this issue now. Intimate matters can also benefit from further thought, attention, or discussion. There is a pleasant intensity to the day, no matter your focus (or lack of focus, at times). Connecting and sharing ideas can be satisfying, and in fact, you can gain quite a bit of ground in a friendship now. Emotional engagement and more profound interactions are favored today, and this can be with a person or even a topic of study.

There's strong energy for problem-solving that gets results in a partnership, dear Virgo. You are eager to deal with inequalities or to explore an exciting activity. You might thoroughly enjoy drawing up plans and coming up with new ideas with a special someone. It’s also a strong day for bringing more creativity and your unique stamp to your projects. You're a little more retiring than usual for much of the day, even with good energy for feeling pleasantly connected to someone or for focusing on a relationship in a comfortable way. Later today, you’re wearing your feelings on your sleeve.

You can find yourself in an excellent position for a work project or plan today, dear Libra. You are confident about a direction to take or a plan coming to mind now. You are thinking in slightly bolder terms about your work or routines, and you're feeling keen and eager to take better care of your health. There's powerful energy for problem-solving. You can feel rather driven to take care of the little problems and details of your daily life today, but you’re also in good shape for interacting with a partner or special someone–an attitude that can enliven the day should you need a diversion. It’s a fine day for easy productivity.

You're likely to feel more independent and ready to express yourself openly and directly today, dear Scorpio. Excellent energy is with you for creative and romantic pursuits. Your sense of harmony and balance is powerful. It's a great time to draw up a design or try a new hobby or form of entertainment. Today’s transits tend to enhance and support your personal plans and energy levels, while you're also ready to take on your responsibilities. You’re in great shape creatively speaking, and you’re ready to take a risk or two with your ideas, creations, and feelings. You need to be part of the game, and good energy is with you for just that.

Problem-solving is strong today, dear Sagittarius, especially around the home and with family or personal matters. Transits also support bringing more balance to your domestic world. Decisions come far more easily now, and they're likely to be very reasonable ones. You're ready to go to bat for someone you care about. Even so, opportunities to relax and bond with others through pleasant, restful activities can emerge now. Domestic issues tend to override other concerns today. Still, you're ready to shake things up so that life doesn't become dull.

Your confidence is strong today, dear Capricorn, particularly regarding your ideas and personal interests or studies. There is great energy for solving problems, especially mechanical and mental ones. Others can recognize you for your wise words or intelligence. You're resourceful, and you're approaching problems courageously and directly, which gets results! It’s a good time to take action to help or defend. You’re also in a strong position to communicate your feelings to family today, and your bond can strengthen through an honest and caring conversation. You can quickly cut through the fluff to the true motivations or bottom line.

Your social instincts are strong today, dear Aquarius, but you're also ready to embrace activities that are absorbing or demanding. It's a good day for new ideas and enthusiasm for a person or project. There is excellent energy with you for problem-solving with business, financial, and practical affairs. You can be taking on a challenge and or taking action on matters, particularly if you have been feeling short-changed. Your resourcefulness is in full force now. It’s easier to feel energized and inspired creatively, particularly if you’re in the position to defend or support your ideas, things, and loved ones. Productivity comes easily today.

Strong energy is with you for self-confident action today, dear Pisces. It's your time to shine! Your reasoning skills are excellent, particularly for new ventures. Making plans and designs can figure strongly now and can excite and motivate you. Experiences that feed your need to be understood and acknowledged can be in the spotlight. Others sense your sincerity, responding in kind. Today's also strong for building better routines and for getting things going from the ground up. You may very much enjoy planning things out now, and attempting to wrap your head around a master plan can be satisfying.
